entries.description: Twingate ZTNA implementation assistant — architecture, deployment, IaC, troubleshooting. Use this plugin whenever working with Twingate, zero trust network access, or any of: connectors, remote networks, resources, security policies, identity providers, device trust, DNS filtering, exit networks, the Twingate API, Twingate Terraform provider, Twingate Pulumi provider, Twingate Kubernetes operator, Twingate gateway, or SSH PAM.

entries.title: vibe-insights
entries.description: Vibe Insights — the deep retrospective for your Claude Code work. Coverage, where-was-I recall, token/cost (incl. the cache reveal), trends, how-you-work, ranked open threads, decisions, languages, per-session friction/satisfaction/outcome, and a synthesized narrative read. Across your full history and every machine you code on. Personal by default; optionally keep chosen sources or repos local-only. No telemetry, all local. MCP-agnostic decisions overlay.

entries.title: claude-skills
entries.description: Personal user-scope Claude Code skills. PKI/ops runbooks: internal-ca (2-tier PKI bootstrap with Vault, OCSP, CRL, Ansible deploy), mtls (server-trusts-client mutual TLS on top of internal-ca), lxd-claude-setup (provision Claude Code on a headless LXD/Linux server). Bare-metal Kubernetes family: k8s-bare-metal (kubeadm + Calico + Longhorn + Rancher, single-node/HA/join, checkpoint-resume), harbor-registry (private Harbor registry with self-signed CA), cicd-platform (Argo CD + self-hosted GitHub Actions runners). MJBL mTLS platform suite (the live deployed ecosystem on this host, indexing the /home/mjbl/* runbooks as source-of-truth): mjbl-mtls-platform, mjbl-ca-operations, mjbl-enrollment-plane, mjbl-client-provisioning, mjbl-cert-lifecycle, mjbl-operator-portal, mjbl-mtls-troubleshooting. Slash commands: /k8s-setup, /harbor-setup, /cicd-setup, and the MJBL suite under /mjbl:mtls:* (platform, ca, enroll, client, cert, portal, troubleshoot, issue-server). MJBL Kubernetes estate suite (the live multi-cluster topology — production rkek8s, the facility/ArgoCD cluster, UAT, and DR — kubeconfigs, MetalLB, ArgoCD external-cluster deploys, and the kubectl-apply DR tooling): mjbl-k8s-platform, mjbl-k8s-production, mjbl-k8s-facility, mjbl-k8s-dr, under /mjbl:k8s:* (platform, prod, facility, dr).

Skills are plain Markdown and activate by task without permanently consuming context. Bundles vendored skills under mixed licenses (MIT, Apache-2.0, CC-BY-SA-4.0) — see per-source attribution in .claude/skills/SKILLS.md.

entries.title: tiered-development
entries.description: Multi-tier model delegation for Claude Code: the Opus coordinator brainstorms a rough plan with you, then chooses the model tier for each slice (or a Sonnet composer picks) — Opus/Fable architects refine and review, Opus builders write substantive code, Sonnet handles mechanical edits/research/verification, and Haiku the menial work. Fable is the premium tier, spent sparingly. A fresh agent per task, each with a clean context. Ships six agents, a gated coordination skill, and three helper workflows (design-panel, execute-wave, review-panel).

entries.title: tms-pipeline
entries.description: An opinionated AI-agent delivery pipeline: staged skills from ticket to review gate, with 04b loop review, multi-agent mob implementation, severity-rated gap audit, cost-tiered escort profiles, and guaranteed follow-up/launch capture.

entries.title: dependabot-reviewer
entries.description: Review, verify, and fix Dependabot and ospo-renovate PRs across all GitHub hosts. /dependabot-review approves safe updates and sets automerge. /dependabot-verify reports PR status read-only. /dependabot-fix fixes a single selected PR or broken main-branch CI interactively — analyses autonomously, proposes a repair plan, and executes after user confirmation.

Commands, skills, sub-agents, and a document-protection hook. Run /openfda:setup once to provision a free personal openFDA API key (one minute, raises rate limits ~1,000 → ~120,000 requests/day).

Ships a page-cited Simplification-List knowledge base over MCP for fix derivation.

entries.title: creatorwood-sushidata-gtm
entries.description: Sushidata is a context data lake for long-term AI memory. This plugin turns Claude into a Sushidata-native agent: ingest community signals from Discord, Slack, and forums; run GTM prospecting and outbound with HeyReach, Hunter, and Apify; build competitor battlecards for PMMs; analyze campaign performance with research swarms; discover ICP signals from won/lost account data; and generate personalized outreach copy. Every finding is saved to the Sushidata context lake so future sessions have full memory of what was learned.

Grounded in the persona at cto-persona.md; frameworks load on demand via frameworks/INDEX.md; prescribes first-party tools instead of rebuilding them (ecosystem-tools.md).

entries.title: arc42-toolkit
entries.description: Provider-agnostic AI skills for creating professional arc42 software architecture documentation. Covers all 12 arc42 sections, cross-section quality review, and automated consistency linting.

entries.title: fno

entries.title: wax-skills

entries.title: cinematic-scroll
entries.description: Build cinematic, scroll-driven websites — pinned chapter reveals, multi-depth parallax, 3D tilt, environment-morphing backgrounds, and full release/launch pages. The motion grammar is the skill; the aesthetic is always the user's. Single self-contained scroll sections (Mode A) or a full Next.js release site with GSAP/Lenis + AI-generated visuals (Mode B), via a 5-phase gated pipeline with taste guardrails, 12 scroll patterns, and a transform/opacity performance budget.

entries.title: mindpowers
entries.description: One loop for knowledge work: shape, draft, review, remember. Mindstorming (formerly brainstorming) refines rough ideas into locked specs through Socratic dialogue; drafting turns locked specs into deliverables; reviewing-docs checks any doc against the template's standards; calibrating remembers what you like for next time. Templates cover business reviews, decision docs, PRDs, briefing docs, comms drafts, frameworks, talking points, and post-mortems.

Identity growth via gated candidate queues; scaling thresholds live in one SSoT script. MCP-Tool-Bridge Policy enforces clear roles (tool/introspection/knowledge) and hard no-gos against MCP-as-truth or cross-project mutation.

entries.title: cowork-to-code-bridge
entries.description: Connect Claude Cowork to Claude Code on your own computer (macOS or Linux). Cowork hands a task to a local Claude Code agent (and can run approved scripts too); the bridge is idempotent, streams progress, and is token-protected. Install with one command; it sets up a global Cowork skill so every session connects automatically — no /plugin, no setup inside Cowork.

entries.title: river-review
entries.description: Capability pack that strengthens AI review for Claude Code: your team's review criteria as versioned, repo-owned skills (a Skill Registry), driven by a review agent that runs perspective-based reviewer roles (code, security, performance, architecture, testing, adversarial) and verifies findings against the diff so humans keep the high-risk judgment.

entries.title: ask
entries.description: Agent-to-human request inbox. A single-binary inbox designed for AI coding agents to file requests for actions only a human can take — set up an OAuth credential, sign into a service, click around a feature and provide feedback, copy a file to a path the agent can't reach. Items live as plain JSON files in .ask/ inside any project. No server, no database, no schema setup.

entries.title: software-development-ht0x
entries.description: A curated set of skills for software development teams, covering technical documentation, design docs, task specs, RFC/ADR authoring, spec-driven development, algorithmic art, and learning systems.

entries.title: devant
entries.description: A single-command, intent-aware coding companion. Onboards by scanning the repo with its own built-in graph, captures the project's vision/direction/non-goals/rules as a local intent graph you own, and works like a teammate who knows what to do and what NOT to do. Lean, fast, ceremony scaled to blast radius. Everything it stores stays local and is never committed.

entries.description: Skill tree for the Onfire MCP. Includes an orchestrator skill that routes user intent across five atomic skills (one per Onfire tool) covering identity resolution, AI prospecting, contact enrichment, and prospecting schema configuration, plus an account-research skill that generates full BDR briefs by combining Onfire MCP, Snowflake EDGAR 10-K filings, and Metabase intent signals.

entries.title: leopold
entries.description: An autonomous orchestration harness for Claude Code: brief it like a teammate, it conducts Claude Code in your seat, deciding from your charter with git locked.

entries.title: skill-bill
entries.description: Portable AI skill suite centered on feature implementation and code review, currently strongest for Android, KMP, Kotlin backend, and agent-config repositories, with room to expand to additional stacks.

entries.title: agentforge
entries.description: Single-source, multi-runtime agent tooling for core-be: skills, agents, workflow commands, and the requirement to production-ready build pipeline, all driven from agent-os/.

entries.title: claude-tdd-pro
entries.description: Drop-in plugin that elevates any codebase to Google's published engineering standards (eng-practices, JS/TS style, Python style). /analyze produces a citable compliance report; /remediate executes a small-CL plan that ratchets the codebase toward the bar; every greenfield prompt is gated by the same RUBRIC.yaml. Hardened against prompt-injection, secret-leakage, and protected-branch commits. Auto-disclosure via Assisted-by: trailer.

entries.title: speculator
entries.description: Speculator — spec quality scoring and a 7-gate pipeline (4 required + 3 opt-in: eval intent, eval quality, comprehension — each bindable to spec risk levels) with LLM-as-judge evaluation, git worktree isolation, and beads issue tracking. Quality In, Quality Out.

entries.title: openclaw-docs
entries.description: Authoritative, daily-refreshed OpenClaw documentation lookup. Bundles a Claude skill (with local lookup CLI + flattened markdown indexes) and a hosted MCP server (vector + trigram search, structural field-check, section extraction, version listing). Use to ground OpenClaw factual claims and prevent hallucinated config fields.

entries.title: jaas
entries.description: Teach Claude to author and operate JaaS — evaluate Jsonnet over HTTP, and publish JsonnetSnippet / JsonnetLibrary resources as Flux ExternalArtifacts.

entries.title: super-pm
entries.description: Product Manager Skills Pack - 39 skills across 5 modules: demand insight, solution design, growth iteration, risk management, and product strategy

entries.title: muse-derivative
entries.description: MUSE 衍生写作姊妹包：同人 / 续写 / 番外 / 跨风格改编。入口 derivative-writing 与 muse-writing 主干几乎一致——跑 pipeline 前用 init_derivative_run.py 按 reuse_mode（fan_fiction/sequel/spin_off/cross_style_rewrite）把原作可继承的 phase 设计 yaml 从 canon 蒸馏物 / 用户已有 pipeline 预置到 work_dir，phase1-5 检测到已有 yaml 就在其上完善（否则从零生成），下游消费与 muse-writing 一致。自含整条衍生 pipeline（phase0-7 + 辅助 skill）；可选依赖 muse-canon-distill 取蒸馏物作继承基线。

entries.title: anycloud
entries.description: Run AI workloads — training, fine-tuning, evals, batch inference — on the cheapest available cloud GPU across AWS, GCP, Azure, Lambda, CoreWeave, and other clouds. Multi-cloud BYOC; spot-aware with automatic preemption recovery.

entries.title: agentdeals
entries.description: Search and compare free tiers, credits, and pricing changes across 1,500+ developer tools. Find deals for databases, hosting, CI/CD, monitoring, and 50+ categories.

entries.title: astra-methodology
entries.description: ASTRA (AI-augmented Sprint Through Rapid Assembly) methodology plugin for Korean enterprise software development. Provides Sprint 0 project initialization, Design Thinking-based planning (/service-planner), blueprint authoring (/blueprint), sprint-level isolated worktrees (/sprint-init), integration testing (/test-run), AI-assisted UAT (/user-test, /uat-parallel with vi|en|ko report-language selection), PR merge automation with integration-branch model (/pr-merge), a mostly-unattended full pipeline (/autorun), and a Target-driven convergence loop with adversarial verification (/loop — mandatory max-iteration HITL, frozen rubric, exit at score ≥ 90 with zero P0s or at max iterations). Enforces coding conventions (Java/TypeScript/React Native/Python/CSS/SCSS), the Korean public data standard dictionary, international code standards (ISO 3166-1/2, ITU-T E.164), design system SSoT (DESIGN.md), and quality gates via read-only validator/reviewer/persona agents. Per-version change rationale: docs/development/changelog-v5.md.

entries.title: agentheim
entries.description: DDD-flavored agentic harness: Socratic vision modeling, bounded contexts, parallel workers, decision records

entries.title: vgv-wingspan
entries.description: VGV Wingspan - AI-native workflows following Very Good Ventures best practices.

entries.title: antigravity
entries.description: Run the Antigravity CLI (Gemini) as a collaborating AI inside Claude Code, with intelligent model routing across the SDLC. Claude conducts — requirements, architecture, the hard 20%, verification, review — and routes deterministic, high-volume work (scaffolding, tests, first-pass review, migrations, web/Vertex AI Search) to Antigravity. Hybrid agentic engineering; lower token cost as a financial lever.

entries.description: Claude Code plugin for Amaris Consulting branded deliverables, brand tools, and strategic deliverable planning

entries.title: tierward

entries.description: Local-first persistent memory for Claude Code — 101 MCP tools, hybrid search (FTS5 + vector + MMR), bitemporal contradictions, GDPR primitives, chatlog auto-capture, multi-agent handoffs.

entries.title: remote-guard
entries.description: Forces a yes/no approval before any remote/cloud command (gcloud, gsutil, bq, aws, az, kubectl, ssh, scp, terraform) and container registry push/login (docker, podman, nerdctl), classifying read vs write, with a /unguard bypass toggle (session-scoped, timed 30m/2h, or persist).

entries.title: faf
entries.description: Persistent Project Context for AI — IANA-registered .faf format. Run /faf to score your project in Claude Code; install the CLI via `bunx faf` or `npm install -g faf-cli` for the full toolkit.

entries.description: Code that blends in. Auto-derives codebase conventions and injects archetype-aware guidance for AI-generated code.
